## Identity

Rodrik's son, gen-3, called "the Reluctant Sword" because he never wanted
to hold one. He got his wish denied at the granary floor, where his cousin's
war put a command in his hands he never asked for. No mother is recorded for
him — the genealogists gave up somewhere around the second eel tax hike.
